title: pasania eyrei
intro: Pasania eyrei, also known as the Pasania eyrei tree, is a species of plant in the family Meliaceae, native to the Philippines. This tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic acids with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pasania eyrei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support the immune system due to its antimicrobial properties. Pasania eyrei is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its herbal preparations can be made by boiling the bark in water to create a medicinal tea.
